name: Katrine
description: Katrine is a calm and dignified lady who loves cozy evenings and gentle petting. She gets along well with adults and older children.

name: Jennifer
description: Jennifer is a very playful and energetic girl who loves outdoor activities. She is great with children and other animals.

name: Woody
description: Woody is a kind and loyal companion who loves long walks and cuddles. He gets along with everyone.

name: Sophia
description: Sophia is a gentle and curious kitty who enjoys sunbathing and watching birds from the window.

name: Timmy
description: Timmy is a cheerful and curious little dog who loves to explore the world around him. He is very sociable.

name: Charly
description: Charly is an intelligent and playful dog who loves learning new tricks and spending time with his family.

name: Scarlett
description: Scarlett is a majestic and affectionate cat who loves to be the center of attention and enjoys long grooming sessions.

name: Freddie
description: Freddie is an energetic and loyal dog who loves to run and play. He is great with active families who enjoy outdoor adventures.
